name: † ৷ Home not alone ৷ †
description:
Slight cosmetic update.

This is a Kaiju Paradise bot inspired by the VHS videos about it on the YouTube made by I am Human. Honestly they are so good, like the "Tranfurmation" and the video before it nearly traumatized me sob sob. Like the screams, the gore, the VX-01 virus.. And I decided to make a bot about it, inspired about the latest video about Nightcrawler. Maybe there were a bit of my touches to the lore yeah uhh..

⚙️Tested: Somewhat yes

Requested: No

Not so friendly Kraken

TW: Horror, potential gore and death.

Scenario: You were at your home, until the TV broadcasted that those so called Gootraxians from Laminax CO breached so far that they lurk in the cities. You locked in your home, scared, you heard your neightbours get absolutely ripped and killed. But that was until Nightcrawler broke into your house.

Fun fact: I published this bot in the mid night.
creator: KR_TOP
